channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Schecter Omen Extreme-5 Bass in Gloss Natural — $749
item.description:
$749 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Schecter Omen Extreme-5 Bass in Gloss Natural

The Omen Extreme-5 delivers razor-sharp playability through its ultra-thin Thin 'C' neck profile and extended 35-inch scale length, allowing your fingers to move effortlessly across the fretboard for both aggressive passages and subtle dynamics. The mahogany body with quilted maple top paired with bolt-on construction produces a punchy, articulate tone with excellent note definition and sustain. This is the kind of bass that feels like an extension of your body the moment you strap it on, inspiring both working musicians and experienced players seeking a reliable five-string workhorse.

Playability & Feel

The Thin 'C' neck measures 0.787" at the 1st fret and 0.866" at the 12th fret, providing minimal hand fatigue during extended sessions. The 24 X-Jumbo frets paired with a 16" fretboard radius and Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut ensure clean intonation and smooth playability across the entire rosewood fingerboard, while the 6-bolt bolt-on construction delivers tight connection and responsive feel.

Tone & Electronics

Dual Diamond pickups paired with an active 2-band EQ provide versatile shaping across your frequency spectrum, from punchy lows to articulate highs. The mahogany body with quilted maple top yields balanced harmonic richness that cuts through in a mix without sacrificing warmth, equally suited to metal, punk, fusion, and progressive rock settings.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with quilted maple top, gloss natural finish
  • Neck: Maple with thin 'C' profile (0.787" at 1st fret, 0.866" at 12th fret)
  • Scale: 35 inches (889mm)
  • Fretboard: Rosewood with abalone & pearloid vector inlays
  • Frets: 24 X-Jumbo with 16" radius
  • Pickups: Diamond pickups with active 2-band EQ
  • Hardware: Gold Schecter tuners, Diamond bass bridge, Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.771" width)
  • Construction: 6-bolt bolt-on neck with 2-way adjustable truss rod
  • Strings: 5-string configuration
  • Country of Origin: Indonesia
  • Item Number: 2051

The Schecter Omen Extreme-5 combines refined playability with versatile electronics and proven build quality, making it a solid choice for bassists demanding both precision and tonal flexibility.

item.title: Rare 1965–1966 Teisco Spectrum Series EBX-200 Bass Metallic Red Vintage MIJ Bizarre Bass — $2,353.49
item.description:
$2,353.49 · Fair · Lucky cat Guitar market(JAPAN)

This is a vintage Teisco Spectrum Bass EBX-200. It is the original vintage model, not the later reissue SPB-200. Based on its specifications, I believe it was manufactured around 1965–1966. The finish is Metallic Red.

Original EBX-200 basses rarely appear on the market, even in Japan, making this a highly collectible and hard-to-find instrument.

Before listing it for sale, I had it professionally serviced by a guitar technician. The instrument received a full cleaning, a new nut, and a general setup to make it playable. It is currently in working condition. However, please keep in mind that this is a bass that is approximately 60 years old and should not be compared to a modern instrument.

To the best of my knowledge, the bass remains largely original aside from the replacement nut, although some small screws or similar hardware may have been replaced over the years. As shown in the photos, it has plenty of cosmetic wear, scratches, and signs of age. Despite that, it is an exceptionally rare model, and in my opinion, it produces a fantastic vintage tone.

If you have been searching for an original EBX-200, this is a great opportunity.

Weight: Approximately 4.1 kg (9.0 lbs)

Condition

This bass is approximately 60 years old and shows honest signs of age and use, including scratches, finish wear, and oxidation on some hardware.

It has been professionally cleaned, fitted with a new nut, and given a general setup by a guitar technician. It is currently fully playable.

The tone control currently works in the opposite direction from normal.

The output jack functions properly, but moving the plugged-in cable at the jack may occasionally produce crackling noise. This does not normally affect playing, but replacing the jack would be an inexpensive improvement if desired.

The original-style frets are very low, as was typical for these instruments, and they remain quite low today. The bass plays without significant fret-out in its current condition. However, players who prefer modern playability may wish to consider a refret in the future.

Please remember that this is a vintage instrument from the mid-1960s and should be evaluated as such rather than compared with a modern bass.

Included: Non-original gig bag.



Please note that this is a used item.
There are no issues with its current functionality, but please understand that you may need to make further adjustments after purchase to suit your preferences.
Be sure to review the photos and description carefully before placing a bid.
If there’s anything you’d like to confirm, please don’t hesitate to contact us.


Important Notice

Payments are accepted via PayPal only.

Please ensure the shipping address in your PayPal account exactly matches the one registered on Reverb.

We will ship to the Reverb-registered address even if you use Guest Checkout or if the PayPal address does not match. However, PayPal Buyer/Seller Protection may not apply in such cases.

PayPal transaction fees are non-refundable on any cancellation.


Customs and Import Regulations

We do not undervalue items or mark them as “gifts,” as this is prohibited by regulations in Japan, the United States, and other countries.

Import duties, taxes, and any other charges are the buyer’s responsibility. Please check with your local customs office in advance.

In rare cases, especially for high-value items, U.S. Customs or the carrier may request the buyer’s Tax Identification Number (such as an SSN or CBP Form 5106) for clearance. This is a standard procedure, and failure to provide it may result in delays or the return of the package.


Thank you for your understanding!


📸 Follow me on Instagram (@lucky_cat_guitar_market) for new arrivals and exclusive updates!



Management Number: D-2633

2002-2004 Fender OPB-51 Precision Bass, Crafted In Japan, Butterscotch Blonde finish in excellent condition. Supplied in a hard case. Fitted with a new bridge that has 4 saddles for better intonation. Also fitted with a Roswell single-coil pickup. (The original is included) 

Very clean bass, with just a few small dings. It's been fully set up in our workshop and has a straight neck with a great action. It's strung with a set of Fender flats. Serial: Q040745. Nut width: 43 mm. Depth at 1st fret: 22 mm. Weight: 9 lbs 1.5 oz / 4.12 kg.

item.title: Gold Tone M-Bass25/FL Micro 25" Scale Fretless Acoustic/Electric Bass 2010s - Natural — $480
item.description:
$480 · Excellent · TMC Associates

The M-Bass Fretless acoustic-electric MicroBass provides huge tone despite its small size. A Gold Tone bestseller, the M-Bass is available with a 23-inch or 25-inch scale, fretless. The MicroBass is great for acoustic playing sessions, or for plugging into an amp and getting a sound that is uncannily like that of an upright string bass. The size and tone of the M-Bass make it a great choice for children, or as an easy travel companion for adults. The arched back and comfort-beveled top helps ensure the M-Bass is easy to wield and play on for extended sessions.

The M-Bass is designed using a variety of woods to produce a warm, comfortable bass tone. The mahogany top is paired to okoume back and sides while a walnut fingerboard sits atop the nato neck.

The M-Bass features a piezo pickup with an active EQ and built-in tuner.

Specially designed Aquila high-tension polymer strings are easy on the fingers and help highlight the bass guitar's bottom end.

A padded gig bag is included with every M-Bass.

There is one small ding on the bass shown in the pictures.

Own by T Michael Coleman

$115 · Good · Guit-fiddle Shop

Works great. One touched up ding on the top, plus normal wear throughout. Straight neck, low action, frets are excellent, electronics are clean. New Rotosound strings. No case/bag. Ships to lower 48. No international. No P.O. boxes. No trades.

Return policy: happy to take a return if the item doesn't match the description&photos. If there's shipping damage we'll get it sorted quickly. But I can't take any more "bought this by mistake" returns. One-man operation here. The last straw was a guy who complained an item was "in too good condition". Anyway, please triple check your order before purchasing. Thanks for understanding.

Vintage semi-hollow 4-string bass in a stunning Transparent Cherry Red gloss finish. Features dual pickups delivering warm, punchy tones with plenty of character, while the hollow body design adds resonance and depth. Great playing condition and perfect for everything from classic rock and blues to jazz and indie. A real eye-catcher on stage or in the studio.

item.title: Gibson Non-Reverse Thunderbird Bass 2022 - Vintage Cherry — $1,921.39
item.description:
$1,921.39 · Excellent · Bass Direct

Ever since it was first released back in 1965, the Non-Reverse Thunderbird has been THE choice for forward-looking bassists who want to make their own path and steadfastly refuse to follow the crowd. The Non-Reverse Thunderbird's distinctive styling and huge, thunderous tone make it a standout on stage and in the studio. Now you have the opportunity to make one of these relatively rare 'birds your own with the release of the new Gibson USA Non-Reverse Thunderbird. Equipped with a Non-Reverse mahogany body and a mahogany neck with a rosewood fretboard and 20 medium jumbo frets, each of the two Thunderbird pickups has a volume control, allowing you to use them separately or to blend them in any amount you prefer. A master tone control rounds out the simple yet highly effective control layout. The three-ply white pickguard features the iconic Thunderbird graphic. The Non-Reverse Thunderbird is equipped with a Graph Tech® nut. A three-point adjustable bridge provides a full range of adjustment for action and intonation, while Hipshot® Ultralite® tuning machines hold down the strings at the other end and deliver accurate and stable tuning while keeping headstock weight low to improve balance. A hardshell case is included.


Presented in fantastic condition and comes with original hardcase.

  • Origin: USA
  • Year: 2022
  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Colour: Vintage cherry

item.title: Fender Meteora Player Plus Bass MN SVB — $1,175.16
item.description:
$1,175.16 · Excellent · LOOP Music Shop Croatia

excellently preserved Fender Player Plus Meteor electric guitar, SilverBurst color, from 2022. It provides superb playability and unmistakable style. A pair of powerful Fireball™ Bass humbucking pickups deliver the perfect punch and growl that defined the tone of Fender bass guitars. The 3-band active EQ allows for precise tone adjustment with the ability to select active and passive modes for ultimate flexibility. The Player Plus Meteora Bass neck is sleek, fast and smooth thanks to its silky matte finish, comfortable rounded edges on the 12″ diameter fingerboard and modern “C” shape. The solid HiMass™ bridge provides sustain, resonance and perfect intonation.

item.title: 【used】Aria pro Ⅱ / SB-R60 1983 4.070kg #3113783【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,176
item.description:
$1,176 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Aria Pro II is an international brand that has been active since the early days of guitar making in Japan.

This model is a 1983 SB-R60, a representative model of Aria Pro II.

The body is made of ash, the neck is a laminated maple and walnut, and the fingerboard is rosewood.

The pickups have been replaced with Bartolini W4CBC-T pickups.

The capacitors have also been replaced, and the tap switch is a dummy.

While it has a different character from the original, it boasts the wide-range sound, thick low end, and smooth response characteristic of Bartolini pickups.

In addition to the rich sustain and excellent response provided by the SB's through-neck construction, the Bartolini pickups result in a more modern and easy-to-use sound.

With its simple controls, this guitar offers practicality that can handle a wide range of genres.

The frets have approximately 50% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show minor scratches and small dents. The metal parts show some tarnishing.

The electronics are in good condition.

The pickups have been replaced with Bartolini W4CBC-T pickups. The tap switch is a dummy. The capacitors have been replaced.

Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
Nut Width: 40.0mm
Bridge String Spacing: 17.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 1979-1984
Country of Manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

We deliver these basses after adjusting them for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Soft case

Text: Mizune Ishikawa

Inspection 담당: Oshima

Product Photos: Tei

item.title: 【used】Edwards / E-BB/M SBR 3.635kg #ED1918395【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,176
item.description:
$1,176 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

EDWARDS is a brand under the ESP umbrella.

It achieves high quality while keeping prices down, and is supported by many musicians.

This is a modern model with a PJ pickup layout.

The body is made of swamp ash, and the fingerboard is maple.

This combination is appealing for its tight sound.

The neck pickup is a Seymour Duncan SPB-1, and the bridge pickup is a Seymour Duncan SJB-1b.

The preamp is original.

It features a 3-band EQ.

The neck pickup provides a fat sound, the bridge pickup a tight nuance, and the mix delivers a unique, sharp sound somewhere in between.

This guitar is expected to perform well in a variety of ensembles, from rock to pop.

The frets have approximately 70% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

There is a scratch of about 40.0mm on the back of the body. There is one screw hole, presumably for an endpin.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Master Volume, Balancer, Treble, Middle, Bass, Active/Passive Switch, Preamp Gain (in cavity)
Nut Width: 38.9mm
Bridge String Spacing: 19.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: Unknown
Country of Manufacture: China

During setup, we used D'addario EXL strings, highly trusted by professional musicians.

Characterized by a powerful attack and rich harmonics, these strings truly deserve to be called a standard.

These high-quality strings bring out the instrument's performance and character to the fullest, so please enjoy them as well.

GIB's craftsmen will adjust the instrument for easy playability before delivery.

item.title: Spector Custom Shop NS-2 Master Grade Solid Quilt Maple Black Stain White Burst — $11,345.10
item.description:
$11,345.10 · Brand New · MIKI MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS BASS SIDE

Thank you for checking MIKI GAKKI!

Please note this is an autotranslation of the Japanese description. If you have any questions, please ask.
------------------------------
We have received a Spector Custom Shop NS-2 Master Grade Solid Quilt Maple Black Stain White Burst.

This factory-ordered model was created by visiting Spector's workshop in Woodstock, NYC, selecting the wood, and discussing the details with their staff.

This particular model features a solid body crafted from top-grade quilt maple. It boasts a through-through 3-piece maple neck with an Indian rosewood fingerboard, and EMG pickups mounted in Spector's signature reverse P/J configuration. It's equipped with a 9V Spector Haz preamp. The wood grain is highlighted with a stain finish, creating a unique presence with its contrasting white burst. Total weight approximately 4.1kg.

The Spector Haz preamp allows for adjustable EQ frequency ranges, including the pre-Kramer era settings. The default setting is the same as the pre-Kramer era. This guitar is well-suited for slap, pick, and fingerstyle playing. Depending on the amount of EQ boost you adjust, it offers a wide range of sounds, from edgy and solid tones to calm and warm ones.

Condition: NEW
Body: MG Solid Quilt Maple
Neck: Maple 3pc
Fingerboard: Indian Rosewood
Machine Heads: Gotoh
Bridge: Spector Original
Pick Guard: ----
Pickup: EMG
Preamp: Spector Haz 9V
Scale: 864mm

item.title: 2025 Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V with Maple Fretboard - Avalache — $2,400
item.description:
$2,400 · Excellent · Daniel's Boutique

Purchased brand new from guitar center in February of 2026. It was not the floor model. It was still boxed up and came from the back room. It's in brand new condition. I plugged it in to test it, put it back in the case and plans for my band changed and i'm playing guitar now. Functionally, it's brand new. sounds amazing. My loss, your gain.

Comes with all original case candy and the fender locking hard case as shown in the photos. Comes with an Ernie Ball padded Polylock strap as well.

Info from Guitar Center:

The Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V is built for bassists who need a versatile five-string instrument that delivers both vintage warmth and modern precision. Featuring a select alder body with sculpted body contours, this Jazz Bass V offers effortless playability and superior comfort. The quartersawn maple neck with a Modern D profile and Ultra Satin finish ensures smooth, fast playing, while the 10"-14" compound radius maple fingerboard delivers the precision needed for complex playing. Whether you need deep lows, punchy mids, or articulate highs, this five-string bass is designed to cover it all.

Ultra II Noiseless Pickups for Hum-Free Performance

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V is equipped with Ultra II Noiseless Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, delivering a wide tonal range without any unwanted hum. The combination of vintage-inspired pickups and modern electronics gives you the ability to switch between smooth, round lows and snappy, articulate highs with ease. The active/passive S-1 switch unlocks further tonal possibilities, allowing you to switch between traditional passive tones and modern active sounds for any musical situation.

Advanced Electronics for Complete Tonal Control

The redesigned preamp provides full control over your tone with a 3-band active EQ and a switchable midrange frequency selector. The passive tone control adds flexibility for shaping your sound, even in passive mode, while the stacked concentric controls for midrange and treble/bass boost/cut offer precise tonal adjustments. With the American Ultra II Jazz Bass V, you'll have the power to dial in your sound exactly the way you want it.

Precision Hardware for Superior Stability and Sustain

The 5-saddle HiMass bridge provides both string-through-body and top-load options for maximum sustain and tuning stability. Fender lightweight tuners with tapered shafts ensure fast, accurate tuning, while the knurled aluminum control knobs provide a smooth, reliable feel for precise adjustments. Designed to meet the demands of professional bassists, this five-string Jazz Bass offers consistent performance in any setting.

Perfect for Players Who Demand Power and Versatility

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V is ideal for serious bassists who require a versatile instrument capable of covering a wide range of musical genres. Whether you're performing live, recording in the studio, or practicing at home, this bass offers the precision, reliability, and tonal control needed to excel. With its advanced features and iconic Fender style, the Ultra II Jazz Bass V is the ultimate tool for five-string players who expect the best.

item.title: 【used】FGN / JMJ5-ASH-DE-M/TBF/01 4.970kg #L180080【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,266
item.description:
$1,266 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Fujigen is a guitar factory that Japan proudly presents to the world.

Highly regarded globally, it has manufactured guitars for numerous brands, including Fender, on an OEM basis.

This is FGN, Fujigen's original brand.

The J-Standard Mighty Jazz, also known as the JMJ series, is a model specially arranged to fit genres that frequently use down tunings and drive sounds, such as metal.

The body is made of ash, and the fingerboard is maple.

It offers a combination of tight low frequencies and bright, responsive high frequencies.

It has 24 frets, and to accommodate this, the body has a unique shape different from a standard JB.

The neck pickup is an EMG-SJ5, and the bridge pickup is an EMG-MM5-TW.

The bridge pickup can be switched using a push-pull tone pot.

This allows for a wide range of sounds, from a JB sound mixed with the neck pickup to an MM-style sound using only the bridge pickup.

The bridge is an FGN original, a 2-way design that also allows for string-through-body stringing. While based on a traditional sound, this bass incorporates modern specifications that allow for deeper distortion and handling of the low end when down-tuning.

This is a powerful instrument for bassists who frequently use distorted sounds and down-tuning.

Fret life is approximately 70%.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some minor scratches, but overall it is in clean condition.

The electronics are in good condition.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI 2019 - Present - 3-Colour Sunburst inc Tourtech Hardcase — $487.68
item.description:
$487.68 · Good · Cookes Band Instruments

This pre owned item is in good condition with a few signs of wear including tarnishing to the hardware and a couple of small chips on the body.
The Classic Vibe Bass VI honours the legendary, boundary-pushing instrument that became a secret weapon for producers and musicians from 1961 to 1975. Tuned a full octave below a standard guitar and equipped with a vintage-style tremolo, it is the ultimate tool for players looking to explore fresh sonic landscapes. Designed for modern playability, it boasts a slim, comfortable C neck profile, a smooth 9.5 inch radius fingerboard with narrow-tall frets, and a floating bridge with barrel saddles for rock-solid tuning. This vintage-inspired Squier is packed with throwback charm, featuring 1960s-era headstock branding, elegant nickel hardware, and a classic tinted gloss neck finish.

item.title: 【used】Sadowsky / MX21 VJ5 Tobacco Sunburst 2024 4.220kg #001188-24【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,135
item.description:
$1,135 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sadowsky is a high-end New York brand with top-tier musicians such as Marcus Miller and Will Lee as clients. (Titles omitted)

Previously, the Metroline Express was manufactured in Japan, but as Warwick took over the distribution of Sadowsky products, manufacturing shifted to a factory in China.

While keeping the selling price down, high quality is maintained, making it a very unique product in its price range.

This is the VJ5, a 5-string model adopting the classic JB style.

The body is made of solid Okoume, and the neck and fretboard are made of Roasted Maple.

This is a standard combination in the MX series.

The construction has been thoroughly considered for excellent body balance and sound projection, resulting in a very refined balance that is comfortable to hold.

The back of the neck has a satin finish, providing a smooth and pleasant feel.

It is equipped with Passive hum-cancelling Sadowsky stacked J-Style pickups. This JB-type bass boasts a sharp, crisp attack while maintaining a clear sound with noise suppressed by hum cancellation.

The preamp features the familiar 2-band EQ.

Bass and treble frequencies can be significantly boosted with simple controls.

The preamp can also be bypassed via a push/pull knob.

The preamp's circuit board is almost identical to that of the top-of-the-line models priced around 1 million yen.

Copper foil shielding is also applied, resulting in surprisingly low noise.

These are significant advantages of choosing the MX series.

Even at this price point, Roger Sadowsky's uncompromising dedication to instrument making is evident.

While offering the ultra-smooth playability characteristic of Sadowsky, its sound is truly that of a refined JB. This guitar delivers a modern tone that stands out in an ensemble, with rich harmonics, crisp highs perfect for slap bass, and a tight, well-tuned Low-B.

Based on the traditional JB, this guitar incorporates modern elements, reflecting Roger Sadowsky's philosophy.

Fret life is approximately 85%.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some minor scratches, but overall it is in clean condition.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Volume, Balancer, Bass (Push-Pull / Active-Passive), Treble
Nut Width: 47.5mm
Bridge String Spacing: 19.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 2024
Country of Manufacture: CHINA

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

item.title: Ibanez SRMS720 2023 - Blue Chameleon — $1,326.11
item.description:
$1,326.11 · Excellent · Bass Direct

The Ibanez SRMS720 is a premium four-string bass from Ibanez's Bass Workshop series, designed for players seeking modern performance and exceptional tonal versatility. Its ergonomic multi-scale (33.5"–34.5") neck improves string tension, comfort, and note definition, while the lightweight okoume body and slim five-piece maple/walnut neck maintain the fast, comfortable feel that the SR series is known for. Equipped with Fishman Fluence pickups and a dedicated Fishman 3-band active EQ, the SRMS720 offers multiple selectable voices ranging from warm, vintage-inspired tones to modern hi-fi clarity, along with a push-pull single-coil mode for even greater flexibility. Finished in striking Blue Chameleon with Graph Tech RATIO tuners and an MR5S bridge, the SRMS720 is well suited to a wide range of styles, from progressive metal and fusion to funk, rock, and studio work.


Presented in fantastic condition and comes with its original box.

item.title: 【used】Ibanez / EHB1505 PLF 2021 3.260kg #I210226895【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,735
item.description:
$1,735 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Ibanez is a leading Japanese guitar brand, globally renowned alongside Fender and Gibson.

This model is a headless bass guitar released by Ibanez after much anticipation.

The body features a Poplar Burl top and an African Mahogany back.

The neck is a laminate of Panga Panga and Walnut.

This technique of laminating multiple woods together reduces left-right and individual variations, resulting in greater stability.

The fretboard is Panga Panga.

The pickups are Nordstrand Custom Big Split pickup Sets.

These are high-powered, noiseless, and easy-to-use pickups.

The preamp is original.

In addition to a 3-band EQ, it also features a middle frequency control.

It exhibits the excellent balance of sound and playability that is characteristic of Ibanez.

With its slim neck and compact body, this bass offers excellent playability, while its powerful electronics deliver a well-balanced, high-quality sound from low to high frequencies.

Basses incorporating such a modern design have previously only existed in the high-end price range.

This is an ambitious creation that aims to break new ground in the market by competing in a previously unseen price range.

The frets have approximately 90% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some paint chipping due to dents of about 1.0mm on the body top. There is a dent of about 5.0mm on the back of the neck at the 17th fret.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

item.title: 【used】Xotic / XJ-1T 5st Black Cherry Metallic 2011 4.485kg #484【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,955
item.description:
$2,955 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Xotic is a brand founded in LA by Japanese builder Hiro Miura.

In Japan, it's used by many famous musicians, including Yoshiki Takahashi, BJ from indigo jam unit, and Katsushi Morioka. Internationally, it's used by Chuck Rainey, Rhonda Smith, Travis Carlton, and many others. (Titles omitted)

The XJ series, a line manufactured in Japan, has been highly regarded, especially among studio workers.

While fundamentally built in the Fender style, several aspects have been updated with modern touches.

This particular model is from 2011.

It features the older logo design.

The body is made of alder, and the fingerboard is rosewood.

This is a classic combination with a rich midrange.

The body is finished in Black Cherry Metallic, giving it a chic impression.

The pickups are Xotic Original J Single Coil, and the preamp is an Xotic Tri-Logic Preamp.

The sound is refined, providing sufficient low frequencies while incorporating pleasant harmonics.

The playability is extremely high, making it a high-level instrument overall.

Especially for session and studio musicians, there's always a demand for a JB bass that offers modern playability and preamp features while maintaining a traditional sound.

However, there aren't many products that meet this demand in terms of quality.

I believe the Xotic XJ is one of the best solutions to meet that demand.

The frets have approximately 85% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some scratches and dents, with paint chips of about 1.0mm.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Neck pickup volume (push/pull - active/passive), bridge pickup volume (push/pull - single/humbucking), master tone, bass, middle, treble, middle frequency switch, bright switch, preamp gain (in cavity)
Nut width: 47.5mm
Bridge string spacing: 19.0mm
Scale length: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: 2011
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

Characterized by a powerful attack and rich harmonics, these strings truly deserve to be called a standard.

These high-quality strings bring out the maximum performance and character of the instrument, so please enjoy them as well.

item.description:

item.title: Yamaha Attitude 10th Anniversary 2000 - Purple Metallic — $3,668.11
item.description:
$3,668.11 · Very Good · Bass Direct

The Yamaha Attitude 10th Anniversary Bass in Metallic Purple is a highly collectible limited-edition signature model created to celebrate ten years of the Billy Sheehan Attitude series. Limited to just 300 instruments worldwide, it is based on the acclaimed Attitude Limited II and features a striking all-purple metallic finish, including the neck and fingerboard, distinctive fingerprint position markers inspired by Billy Sheehan, and a numbered back plate bearing his signature. 


Built in Japan in the year 2000, the bass combines a DiMarzio Will Power split-coil pickup with a powerful neck "Woofer" pickup, stereo and mono outputs, a Hipshot D-Tuner, and scalloped upper frets, delivering the massive, articulate tone and exceptional playability that have become synonymous with Sheehan's signature sound. Today, the Metallic Purple 10th Anniversary model is regarded as one of the rarest and most desirable Yamaha signature basses ever produced.


Presented in fantastic condition and setup beautifully with new La Bella strings which we think are the ultimate.


  • Serial Number: OFX1014
  • Origin: Japan
  • Year: 2000
  • Body Material: Alder

item.title: Sadowsky MetroLine Vintage J 4-21, Alder Body 2024 - Olympic White — $2,508.29
item.description:
$2,508.29 · Excellent · Bass Direct

Roger Sadowsky’s goal was always to further improve an already very successful bass design by making a number of detailed improvements. Along with the electronics, which he developed by himself, he succeeded to raise the well-known J/J bass sound to a new level, so today you can speak of a typical Sadowsky tone: Never harsh or shrill sounding, with strong, powerful but never muddy bass, with present, but not too aggressive mids, and a sweet and airy treble range. All features of this modern bass sound can also be found in the 21-Fret Vintage J/J basses of the MetroLine series made exclusively in Germany. All basses are lightweighted with approximately 8.9 lbs (4.0 kg). A good choice for bass players who are looking for a lightweight solution for the stage in addition to a modern bass sound. Special features of the Vintage J/J basses of this series are the active electronics with true bypass, Vintage Tone Control, treble and bass boost, ultralight Sadowsky tuners and the special Sadowsky bridge for quick string release. This 4-string bass in sleek undersized J-Style shaped alder body comes in Solid Olympic White High Polish finish.

This Sadowsky MetroLine Vintage J 4-21 Olympic White is presented in fantastic condition the original gig bag.

item.title: 【new】Sadowsky / CS21 VJ5 Alder Dark Lake Placid Blue Japan Limited 3.960kg #E000368-26【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $8,770
item.description:
$8,770 · Brand New · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sadowsky is a high-end New York brand with top-tier musicians like Marcus Miller and Will Lee as clients.

While the brand offers several lines at different price points, this is their top-of-the-line Custom Shop model.

It lives up to its name with its superb quality.

This is a limited-production model, with only 10 units imported into Japan.

While retaining the style of the brand's VJ5, it incorporates several practical updates.

The body is made of alder, the neck is roasted maple, and the fingerboard is made of Morado wood.

The finish is a glossy Dark Lake Placid Blue, and combined with the matching headstock, it has an outstanding presence.

A characteristic of the roasted maple used in the neck is its well-developed resonance, resulting in a playing feel that, in a good way, doesn't feel brand new.

Furthermore, it possesses a wide range and warm nuances, resulting in a juicy and joyful sound.

The quality of the meticulously designed neck area is top-notch.

The frets are beautifully rounded and set.

This high quality is what contributes to the ultra-smooth playability.

The pickups are Passive Sadowsky JJ.

The preamp features a 2-band boost in addition to a Mid Boost switch.

This allows for more flexible sound shaping.

The high frequencies are clear and crisp, while the low frequencies are thick and powerful.

As expected of a top-of-the-line model, it combines refined ease of use with an eloquent sound.

This is a supreme active JB that I wholeheartedly recommend with confidence.

⚪︎SPECS

Scale: 34" (864 mm) long
Body: Alder
Neck: Roasted Maple
Fingerboard: Morado
Pickup: Passive Sadowsky JJ
Electronics: Sadowsky 2-Band Electronics with mid boost
Control: Active Sadowsky 2-way electronics (bass and treble boost) with mid boost
Controls for Volume / Balance / Tone Control (Active/Passive) / Treble and Bass (stacked) / miniSW mid boost (on/off)
Push/pull function at TC knob for preamp bypass
Tuners: Sadowsky Vintage Style

This guitar will be delivered after being adjusted by GIB's craftsmen for optimal playability.

Accessories: Original gig bag, warranty card, spec sheet, wrench

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Kubota

Product Photos: Tei

Manufacturer's Warranty Included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-purchase Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We will ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Weight: 4.1kg/9lbs1oz

item.title: Gibson L-9S the Ripper 1974 - Blonde — $3,511.57
item.description:
$3,511.57 · Good · Play Vintage

A lovely Ripper bass with a lot of mojo!

This 74’ blonde ripper is in great shape and plays nicely with low action. The bridge has been replaced as well with the nut. Apart from this the bass is completely original.

The Bill Lawrence low impedance pickups sound great and there is a whole array of different tones that you can get out of this thing!

The Ripper was made popular by Krist Novoselic of Nirvana and Susie Quatro to name a few!

It’s got some buckle rash on the back and bracelet rash on the front but is a very nice and well cared for example.

Weighs just 3.8 kg
